name: Launchpad UI - Premium New Tab
description: A beautiful, premium new tab page with weather, tasks, quotes, quick apps, and more!
author: Satyajit Mishra

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; object-src 'self'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' https://www.google.com https://*.openweathermap.org data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.openweathermap.org https://gnews.io https://dummyjson.com https://github-contributions-api.jogruber.de https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org https://api.github.com
